name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_result_seed

note: Readiness gate input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_temporal_resolution

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_transit

note: Target physics input.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_probe_map

note: Spatial probe identity input.

note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.
